title: Error
description: Event: `error`. Emitted when an unrecoverable error occurs during request processing. The nested `error` object shape (`{ code, message }`) is preserved for wire compatibility with clients that destructure `message.error.code`. `details` carries additional structured context when available.

requestId.description: Echoes the `requestId` from the originating action, if applicable. Absent for server-initiated errors with no associated request.

error.description: Top-level error object (duplicate of `data.error`; kept for clients that pattern-match on the envelope-level `error` field).

requestId.description: The request ID this error belongs to, if any.

error.description: The error descriptor (nested for wire backward-compatibility).

details.description: Optional additional structured error context (e.g. validation issues, partial results).

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.
